profile.warranty_terms: Varies by region and specific model, typically 1-2 years against manufacturing defects.
profile.manufacturing_ethos: Spada operates as a vertically integrated group that designs, engineers, and manufactures its own helmets in-house using proprietary materials and advanced composite technologies.
profile.story:
Founded in 1974 by Giancarlo Spada in Italy, the brand began with a focus on leather goods and accessories before pivoting to become a premier manufacturer of motorcycle safety equipment. The company established itself as a significant player in the European market by emphasizing high-quality craftsmanship and rigorous adherence to safety standards, eventually expanding its product line to include full-face, modular, and open-face helmets for both road racing and street use.

Over the decades, Spada has maintained a reputation for innovation, particularly in the development of lightweight yet durable composite shells and advanced visor systems. The brand is known for collaborating closely with professional racers and tuning its designs to meet the evolving demands of homologation standards such as ECE 22.06 and FIM regulations. While it competes globally, Spada retains a strong identity rooted in Italian engineering traditions.

Today, Spada operates as part of the larger Spada Group, which encompasses various subsidiaries focused on different aspects of motorcycle gear and accessories. The brand continues to position itself as a premium option for riders seeking a balance between performance, safety, and style, distinguishing itself through its in-house manufacturing capabilities and commitment to continuous R&D in helmet technology.
